title: Resignation Letter — NaviWell Group (Jan 9 → last day Jan 11)
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir's formal resignation letter to NaviWell Group dated Jan 9, 2026, last day Jan 11, 2026 — only ~2 days notice.
  • Tone is professional, gracious, vague: "A new opportunity has presented itself that I believe is the best path forward for my future career."
  • The "new opportunity" is almost certainly all-in on Rankett — the resignation lands ~4 days after the Rankett Partner Program infrastructure doc and 2 days after the Jan 7 meetup prep. The bet is being placed.
  • Closes the NaviWell health coach chapter that started Aug 2025 — ~5 months total — and ends the formal bridge income arrangement of the early Austin era.
  • Notable: zero mention of Rankett by name. Letter discipline. Yahir has internalized the "never reveal the next thing in the exit letter" convention.

Core content

The letter is 7 sentences. Every required beat: notice + last day + thanks + transparency-but-vague + commitment to smooth transition + offer to help with handoff + sign-off. No grievances. No specifics. No new-employer name. The 2-day notice is short by professional-norm standards, suggesting Yahir was either (a) confident NaviWell would respect the call without retaliation, or (b) urgent enough on the Rankett side that the calendar mattered more than the relationship optics.

Pattern observed

This is the closing bookend of the bridge income strategy arc — the original May 2025 Austin move plan explicitly framed bridge work as temporary scaffolding for "I want to work for myself." The resignation is the moment Yahir cuts the scaffold. The Sept 23 "how I'm scraping by" note (selling the gun at 50% off) was the low; this letter is the structural exit from the salaried-replacement income state.

Sequenced into the Rankett timeline: Jan 5 partner-program doc → Jan 7 meetup-prep → Jan 9 resignation → Jan 11 meetup-prep revision → Jan 13 Rankett.com naming/branding work. The whole week is a single coordinated sprint into all-in mode.

Privacy

  • No PII beyond Yahir's own name and the company name (NaviWell already cataloged).

Connections

  • naviwell group — exiting employer
  • rankett — implied next bet
  • bridge income strategies — the arc being closed
  • 2026 01 05 rankett infrastructure · 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide · 2026 01 13 rankett com — same-week sprint
  • 2025 09 23 how im scraping by — the financial low this exit assumes is recoverable
  • planet fitness · lift atx — adjacent gym-economy options
  • max effort commit · memento mori decision filter — decision-frame archetypes
